title: Bloome 2pk Assorted Vase Aroma Mist Diffuser Lavender 200ml - Decorative Perfect Electric Essential Oil Diffusers for Home, Office, & Bathroom, Long Lasting USB Plug In for Pet Odours & Room Freshness
features: Complete Diffuser Set Included – Each 2-pack contains a USB-powered assorted vase diffuser, a 10ml lavender fragrance oil in a glass bottle, 1 cotton wick, 1 USB cable, and instructions for quick, simple use.

Stylish Assortment of Vase Designs – Enjoy a mix of light and dark wood-effect finishes, making each electric diffusers for essential oils as decorative as it is functional. Perfect for blending seamlessly into any room décor aesthetic.
USB-Powered Convenience – Use safely with a wall adapter for consistent performance. A practical addition to your home, offering hassle-free operation without the need for batteries.

Lavender Scented Atmosphere – The included water-based lavender oil brings a soothing aroma, creating a refreshing environment at home, in the office, or while travelling. Just add a few drops and enjoy.

Versatile Home Décor Accessory – Works beautifully as both a diffuser and a decorative piece, enhancing living rooms, bedrooms, or workspaces. Lightweight and compact, ideal for gifting or personal use.
description: Product Description Previous page Next page Keep Every Room Fresh – Diffusers, Plug-Ins & Gels for Lasting Fragrance! 2pk Vase Diffuser Add To Basket 2pk Round Diffuser Add To Basket 4pk Plug In + 22 Refills Add To Basket 4pk Plug In + 11 Refills Add To Basket 4pk Wall Plug In Add To Basket Customer Reviews 3.5 out of 5 stars 18 3.9 out of 5 stars 9 2.5 out of 5 stars 2 3.1 out of 5 stars 20 1.0 out of 5 stars 7 Price £8.99 £ 8 . 99 £9.49 £ 9 . 49 £24.99 £ 24 . 99 £14.99 £ 14 . 99 £9.99 £ 9 . 99 Suitable for Any Space ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Giftable ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Compact Design ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Easy to Use ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Long-Lasting Performance ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ What comes in the Bloome 2pk Assorted Vase Diffuser Lavender set? Each 2-pack includes one USB-powered vase diffuser, a 10ml lavender fragrance oil in a glass bottle, 1 cotton wick, 1 USB cable, and simple instructions for quick setup. Are the designs identical or assorted?. You will receive an assortment of light and dark wood-effect vase designs. Each electric diffuser for essential oils is decorative and functional, blending beautifully into any décor. How do I use this USB aroma diffuser? Fill the diffuser with water, add a few drops of lavender oil or other essential oils, connect the USB cable, and switch it on. The aroma diffuser will release a fine mist to refresh your room. Can this diffuser be used in different rooms? Yes, this versatile aroma diffuser is ideal for bedrooms, living rooms, kitchens, offices, or bathrooms. Its compact design makes it suitable as both a room diffuser and a decorative home accessory. Does the diffuser only work with lavender oil? No, while the set includes a 10ml lavender essential oil, the diffuser is compatible with a wide variety of essential oils for diffusers, allowing you to personalise your fragrance experience
